{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Truegold Remnant
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Six [[Jai]] Highgolds were spearing a [[Truegold Remnant]] to death.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The puppet construct was stitched together from [[Truegold Remnant]] parts.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
